app.title: Douyin Auto Streak
app.captcha_hint: If a captcha appears on the 'Douyin Page', you can solve it manually there.
app.login_hint: Please login on the right page
app.douyin_loaded: Douyin page is loaded on the right. (Switch to 'Friends List' to hide it).
app.schedule_desc: When enabled, tasks will run automatically in the background at the set time
app.daily_time_desc: Will automatically streak your friends at this time every day
app.no_friends: No friends data. Maybe not logged in or list is empty.
app.sync_fail_nologin: Failed to fetch friends data, please check login status
app.not_logged_in_check: Not logged in, skipping auto sync. Please go to 'Douyin Page' to login.
app.login_not_detected: Login status not detected, please make sure you scanned successfully.
app.logout_confirm_warn: Data cannot be recovered, you will need to scan QR code again to login.
app.logout_confirm:
Are you sure you want to logout?
You will need to scan QR code again.
app.stopping: [Stopping] Waiting for current step to abort...
